canonical_name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (Ayushman Bharat)

income_thresholds.description: Annual household income must be below Rs 2.5 lakh as per SECC 2011 deprivation criteria

exclusion_rules.description: Families where any member has employer-provided health insurance are excluded
Government employees and their families are excluded
Any family member paying income tax disqualifies the entire household
Families owning motorized two-wheeler, three-wheeler, four-wheeler, or fishing boat are excluded
Families owning mechanized three- or four-wheeler agricultural equipment are excluded
Families with Kisan Credit Card limit above Rs 50,000 are excluded
Families owning more than 2.5 acres of irrigated land with at least one irrigation equipment are excluded

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as defined in SECC 2011 database; no cap on family size. Coverage is floater across all family members listed in the Ayushman card.

covered_procedures: Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for e-KYC verification at empanelled hospital or CSC

required_documents.name: Ration Card (NFSA)
required_documents.notes: NFSA ration card holders are auto-included. If not available, SECC inclusion letter is checked.

required_documents.name: SECC 2011 Inclusion Letter
required_documents.notes: Letter confirming family is listed in SECC 2011 deprivation database under D1-D7 categories

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Aadhaar for OTP-based verification. Family member's number acceptable.

required_documents.name: Family Photo
required_documents.notes: Required for new Ayushman card generation at CSC or hospital

enrollment_channels: Common Service Centre (CSC / Jan Seva Kendra)
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility on pmjay.gov.in or call 14555 with Aadhaar number or ration card number
Step 2: Visit nearest CSC (Jan Seva Kendra) or empanelled hospital with Aadhaar card and ration card
Step 3: Complete e-KYC verification (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 4: Operator verifies SECC 2011 inclusion status in the BIS portal
Step 5: Family photograph taken and uploaded to the system
Step 6: Ayushman card (Golden Card) generated and printed on the spot
Step 7: Card is valid immediately; present at any empanelled hospital for cashless treatment
description_for_embedding: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) is India's flagship central government health insurance scheme under Ayushman Bharat. It provides Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization to over 55 crore beneficiaries from economically vulnerable families identified through SECC 2011 deprivation criteria. The scheme covers 1,393 medical packages across 26 specialties at empanelled public and private hospitals. Free for beneficiaries with no premium. Available in all states except West Bengal and Delhi. Enrollment via CSC, empanelled hospitals, or online.
